canvas.description: Base action canvas color for primary surfaces.

canvas-subtle.description: Subtle action canvas color for the least-prominent, lightly tinted surfaces.

canvas-muted.description: Muted action canvas color for low-emphasis, recessed surfaces.

canvas-emphasis.description: Emphasis action canvas color for high-prominence surfaces.

canvas-inverse.description: Base inverse action canvas color for surfaces on dark or inverted contexts.

canvas-inverse-subtle.description: Subtle inverse action canvas color for the least-prominent surfaces in inverse contexts.

canvas-inverse-muted.description: Muted inverse action canvas color for low-emphasis surfaces in inverse contexts.

canvas-inverse-emphasis.description: Emphasis inverse action canvas color for high-prominence surfaces in inverse contexts.

ink.description: Base action ink color for body text and icons on neutral or light canvases.

ink-subtle.description: Subtle action ink color for the least-prominent, tertiary text and icons.

ink-muted.description: Muted action ink color for secondary text and icons.

ink-emphasis.description: Emphasis action ink color for high-prominence text and icons.

ink-inverse.description: Base inverse action ink color for body text and icons on inverse or dark canvases.

ink-inverse-subtle.description: Subtle inverse action ink color for the least-prominent text and icons on inverse canvases.

ink-inverse-muted.description: Muted inverse action ink color for secondary text and icons on inverse canvases.

ink-inverse-emphasis.description: Emphasis inverse action ink color for high-prominence text on inverse canvases.

border.description: Base action border color for outlines, strokes, and dividers.

border-subtle.description: Subtle action border color for the least-prominent outlines and dividers.

border-muted.description: Muted action border color for low-emphasis outlines and dividers.

border-emphasis.description: Emphasis action border color for high-prominence outlines and dividers.

border-inverse.description: Base inverse action border color for outlines and dividers on inverse canvases.

border-inverse-subtle.description: Subtle inverse action border color for the least-prominent outlines on inverse canvases.

border-inverse-muted.description: Muted inverse action border color for low-emphasis outlines on inverse canvases.

border-inverse-emphasis.description: Emphasis inverse action border color for high-prominence outlines on inverse canvases.
